summary:
Align canonical JSON output with repo EOF policies so generated artifacts are not silently modified by pre-commit hooks.
Clarify in-spec that JSON is minified and newline-terminated.
decisions: Terminate JSON output with a single trailing \n.
Update SPECS/dev plan text to match this behavior.
pitfalls: Pre-commit end-of-file fixers can mutate generated artifacts after staging, causing `kb index check` to fail.
`tree.jsonl` bytes/lines depend on exact newline normalization of tracked files; regenerate after auto-fixes.
